zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe von der Pfalz於1376年出生在德國貝也安格時，她的父親Ruprecht III von der Pfalz24歲，母親Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg18歲。她於1393年2月6日與Charles II de Lorraine在德國貝也安格結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年8月26日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒艾維爾-奧-亞德享年58歲，埋葬在法國洛萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarethe von der Pfalz于1376年出生在德国貝也安格时，她的父亲Ruprecht III von der Pfalz24岁，母亲Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg18岁。她于1393年2月6日与Charles II de Lorraine在德国貝也安格结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年8月26日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒艾維爾-奧-亞德享年58岁，埋葬在法国洛萊。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Pfalz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the Palatinate (German Pfalz), a region in southwestern Germany.

variants.name: Pfalzgraf
meanings: German: status name for the governor or judge at an imperial court, or for someone in the service of such a dignitary, from Middle High German phalenzgrāve. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Pfaltzgraff .

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe von der Pfalz was born in 1376, in Amberg, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Ruprecht III von der Pfalz, was 24 and her mother, Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg, was 18. She married Charles II de Lorraine on 6 February 1393, in Amberg, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 26 August 1434, in Einville-au-Jard, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe von der Pfalz est née en 1376, à Amberg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Ruprecht III von der Pfalz, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Charles II de Lorraine le 6 février 1393, à Amberg, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 août 1434, à Einville-au-Jard, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Lorraine, France.

de.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: Amberg, Kreis Goldap, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe von der Pfalz 1376 in Amberg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ruprecht III von der Pfalz 24 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg 18. Sie hat am 6. Februar 1393 in Amberg, Bayern, Deutschland Charles II de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. August 1434 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Einville-au-Jard, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Charles II de Lorraine il 6 febbraio 1393, nel Amberg, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe von der Pfalz(이)가 1376년 독일 베이른 아버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ruprecht III von der Pfalz(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1393년 2월 6일 독일 베이른 아버그에서 Charles II de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 8월 26일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 아이비레-오-자르드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von der Pfalz nasceu em 1376, em Amberg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Ruprecht III von der Pfalz, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles II de Lorraine em 6 de fevereiro de 1393, em Amberg, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.Amberg, Goldap, East Prussia, Prussia, G: эмбирг, крис голдап, остпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe von der Pfalz родилась в 1376 г. в местности эмбирг, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Ruprecht III von der Pfalz было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Hohenzollern-Nürnberg, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles II de Lorraine 6 февраля 1393 г. в местности эмбирг, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 августа 1434 г. в местности эинвилле-ау-джард, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности лорреаин, Франция.

Se casó con Charles II de Lorraine el 6 de febrero de 1393, en Amberg, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas.
